case_title: MARCO P RAMIREZ VS. WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED MAY-05-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, MARCO P AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MARCO P ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MARCO P IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APPEARS WITH COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY. DEFENDANT IS REPRESENTED BY JOANNE SORBET WHO WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MARCO P AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.
